code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about a company (or related entities) into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    # Mapping from predicate to a natural‑language verb phrase.
    verb_map = {
        "country": "is located in",
        "foundingDate": "was founded on",
        "industry": "operates in",
        "city": "is based in",
        "netIncome": "has a net income of",
        "operatingIncome": "has an operating income of",
        "regionServed": "serves the region",
        "areaTotal": "covers an area of",
        "leader": "is led by",
        "leaderTitle": "holds the title",
        "populationDensity": "has a population density of",
        "foundationPlace": "was founded at",
        "numberOfEmployees": "employs",
        "numberOfLocations": "has",
        "service": "provides",
        "type": "is a",
        "alternativeName": "is also known as",
        "birthDate": "was born on",
        "keyPerson": "has key person",
        "cost": "costs",
        "location": "is located at",
        "product": "produces",
        "subsidiary": "has subsidiary",
        "timeZone": "lies in the time zone",
        "isPartOf": "is part of",
        "parentCompany": "is a subsidiary of",
        "capital": "has capital",
        "motto": "has the motto",
        "officialLanguage": "has official language",
        "leaderParty": "belongs to the party",
        "areaUrban": "has an urban area of",
        "part": "includes",
        "revenue": "has revenue of",
        "ethnicGroup": "has ethnic group",
        "governmentType": "has government type",
        "percentageOfAreaWater": "has water area percentage of",
        "longName": "long name is",
        "populationTotal": "has a population of",
        "language": "speaks",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "is at an elevation of",
    }

    def phrase(triple: Triple) -> str:
        verb = verb_map.get(triple.predicate, triple.predicate)
        # Add a simple article for some predicates
        if verb.startswith("is ") or verb.startswith("has ") or verb.startswith("lies"):
            return f"{triple.subject} {verb} {triple.object}"
        else:
            return f"{triple.subject} {verb} {triple.object}"

    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Build a list of clause strings
    clauses = [phrase(t) for t in triples]

    # Join clauses into a single sentence
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        return clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        # Use commas and an "and" before the last clause for readability
        return ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
